name: ioe-v3
description: Issue Orchestration Engine v3 — one iteration: select -> plan -> implement -> test -> document -> review(unrolled 3 rounds) -> fold-in -> triage -> report -> merge. Sequential only; spawn a second instance for parallel work.

issue.description: Issue number to work on directly; empty = let the selector recommend

base.description: Base branch to branch from and merge into

test-command.description: Test command to run (empty = skip testing)

completed.description: JSON array of issue numbers already completed this session (excluded from selection)

repo.description: owner/repo to work on; empty = current repo

phases.task: MODE: cleanup. Remove stale worktrees under .claude/worktrees/ and orphaned ioe-v3-* branches whose worktree no longer exists. Run `git worktree prune` first. Be conservative — only remove things that are clearly orphaned. Report what you removed.

Recommend the next single issue to work on. Repo: {args.repo} (empty = current repo). Completed issues to exclude: {args.completed}. Output ONLY the JSON shape from your instructions (recommended_issue, alternatives, rationale, backlog_count).

Fetch the single specific issue #{args.issue}. Repo: {args.repo} (empty = current repo). Output ONLY the JSON shape from your instructions with alternatives: [] and rationale mentioning --issue was provided.

Confirm whether any unresolved merge_blockers remain after the review loop. If any remain, end with 'VERDICT: BLOCK' and a one-line reason per blocker. If none, end with 'VERDICT: PASS'.

{steps.review-summary.output}

Confirm whether the fold-in fixes introduced any new merge_blockers. If any, end with 'VERDICT: BLOCK' and reasons; otherwise 'VERDICT: PASS'.

{steps.fold-in-verify.output}

Implementation complete for issue #{steps.plan.json.issue.number}. Report: {steps.reports.json.report_path}

Approve = merge into {args.base} and CONTINUE to the next issue (the outer skill will loop). Edit = 'merge and stop' or 'stop without merging'. Reject = stop without merging.

Merge conflicts detected while rebasing {steps.plan.json.branch} onto {args.base}.

Conflicting files:
{steps.merge.json.conflicting_files}

Resolve the conflicts in the worktree ({steps.plan.json.worktree_path}), stage them with `git add`, then Approve to continue the merge. Reject = abort this merge (leave the worktree as-is).
